text.title: Interface Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the interface-analysis methodology end-to-end.

step.name: catalog-boundaries
step.action: Enumerate every boundary touchpoint; assign IF-id.

step.name: classify
step.action: Tag each as system | user | hardware | communication.

step.name: specify
step.action: Per-interface spec with all required fields.

step.name: merge-into-landscape
step.action: Diff + merge into integration landscape register.

step.name: review-and-sign-off
step.action: Architecture + security review; commit; tag release.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
